ab: Hmnuya su miyah ka isu?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Mnksa ku miyah ka yaku.
Tnapa su rulu manu miyah ka isu?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: Tnapa ku basu miyah ka yaku.
en: B: I came here by bus.

ab: Nchuya su musa pnrhulan ka isu?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Mriq rulu ka tama mu mapa knan msupu musa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: Nchuya musa sapah pyasan kddiyax ka hiya?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Tapa cyeyyun musa sapah pyasan ka hiya.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Mnchuya musa mari sama ka bubu rudan su?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Mriq otobay musa mari sama ka hiya.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: Nchuya su musa Tao ka isu?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: Mptapa ku asu musa Tao ka yaku.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: Nchnuya musa Tao ka hiya?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Mptapa skoki musa Tao ka hiya?
en: B: He's flying to Orchid Island?

ab: Tapa rulu manu musa Takaw ka hiya hu?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: Tnapa kawtyey musa Takaw ka hiya.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Tnapa kisya musa Tayto ka hiya hu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Iyaq, tapa kisya musa Tayto ka hiya.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: Tnapa kisya musa Tayto ka hiya hu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Uxay, tapa skoki musa Tayto ka hiya.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Niqan sanan tapa basu ka ssiyaw hini hu?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Niqan, msdurux mksa da u kiya qtaun su ka ppaun basu da.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Weynu ka ceyyun msdalih bay hini?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Uka ceyyun ka hini, wana haya ka malu su ppaun.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Khnu diyax ka tapa basu dhuq sapah pyasan hu?
ch: A:搭公車多久會到學校呢?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Maxal rima pungkang ka mpdhuq sapah pyasan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Khnu diyax dhuq Taycyu ka tapa kawtyey?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: Kingal jikang ka mpdhuq Taycyu.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Bsiyaq balay ka mriq rulu musa Ulay hu?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Ya bay kingal jikang.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Khnu qnbsyaqan tapa su ceyyun miyah sapah mu ka isu?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Asi ka mpusal pungkang.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mkla su mriq ddeyngsya hu?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mkla ku mriq ddeyngsya ka yaku.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Niqan otobay su ka isu hu?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Niqan ku kingal otobay ka yaku.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Niqan otobay su ka isu hu?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Uka otobay mu ka yaku.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
